ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 608
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (276548): James Nevin, Esq., for Plaintiff Jennifer Gamba; Ernest Faitos, Esq., for Defendant Associated Insulation of California; Fireman's Fund Insurance Company [Insurer].

Appearances (276279): James Nevin, Esq., for Plaintiff Esther Shiffer; Arturo Sandoval, Esq., for Defendant BW/IP International Inc.; Nicole Gage, Esq., for Defendant Flowserve US Inc.; no appearance was made on behalf of Defendant Wismer & Becker Contracting Engineers.

Appearances (276467): James Nevin, Esq., for Plaintiff Janice Hebebrand; Arturo Sandoval, Esq., for Defendant Red Feather Construction, Inc.

At the Court's request, Mr. Nevin advises the Court that the three matters referenced above should be consolidated for trial. Upon inquiry by the Court, Mr. Nevin advises the Court that he can have a motion for the same filed by tomorrow [Nov. 27, 2018]. After discussion, counsel represent that they can file opposition/response by Dec. 3, 2018. Hearing will be held on the motion on Dec. 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m.

Mr. Nevin also advises the Court that a mandatory settlement conference is scheduled for tomorrow, Nov. 27, 2018 at 9:30 for all three cases. The Court advises counsel to refrain from filing trial pleadings (e.g., motions in limine, etc.) pending the outcome of the MSC.

For future reference, Mr. Sandoval advises the Court that he will be away on vacation from Dec. 21, 2018 through Dec. 28, 2018 which the Court duly notes.

Court adjourns.

Judge: Hon. Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: not reported. (D608)
